name: Workspace list is org-scoped
description: TC-005-079/080: GET /api/workspaces must not return workspaces from other organizations

steps.name: listing workspaces with a bogus org ID yields no leakage
REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil
